response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js knowledge, aligning well with the role's core requirements. However, her recent work leans heavily into AI-agent infrastructure and Dlang, with limited direct exposure to PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy/construction tech domains. Her seniority level may also overshadow the entry/mid-level expectations.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and related frameworks
Experience with scalable systems and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability to new technologies
concerns: Limited recent experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js, core requirements for this role
Overqualified for an entry/mid-level position, risk of mismatched expectations
No clear industry-specific experience in renewable energy or construction technology
